title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: An AWS Developers tutorial explaining AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals in under 10 minutes. Covers users, roles, policies, least privilege principle, IAM Access Analyzer, and security best practices like avoiding hardcoded access keys.
